mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name FROM symbols WHERE id = #{symbolId} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, code, name FROM symbols WHERE code = #{code} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.symbol_id AS symbolId, o.side, o.order_type AS orderType, o.limit_price AS price, o.requested_quantity AS quantity, o.filled_quantity AS filledQuantity, o.status, o.created_at AS createdAt, o.updated_at AS updatedAt, s.code, s.name FROM orders o JOIN symbols s ON s.id = o.symbol_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC, o.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.symbol_id AS symbolId, o.side, o.order_type AS orderType, o.limit_price AS price, o.requested_quantity AS quantity, o.filled_quantity AS filledQuantity, o.status, o.created_at AS createdAt, o.updated_at AS updatedAt, s.code, s.name FROM orders o JOIN symbols s ON s.id = o.symbol_id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, symbol_id, side, order_type, status, requested_quantity, filled_quantity, limit_price, source, note, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{symbolId}, #{side}, #{orderType}, #{status}, #{quantity}, #{filledQuantity}, #{price}, 'manual', NULL, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
